name: AB SKF
lede: SKF runs nine capability centers across six Indian cities. Bengaluru, Pune, Haridwar, Mumbai, Mysuru and Ahmedabad, covering distribution, engineering & design, manufacturing and sales & marketing, built over fifteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one SKF office in India. We map nine, across six cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: AB SKF GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: SKF runs 9 verified GCC centers across 6 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Pune, Haridwar, Mumbai, Mysuru, Ahmedabad), covering distribution, engineering & design, manufacturing and sales & marketing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: COE (Centre of Excellence)- Inside Sales India and South East Asia & Head - Inside Sales India
Vice President and Head of Human Resources SKF ISEA Operations (India, South East Asia)

about.description: SKF's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Pune, Haridwar, Mumbai, Mysuru and Ahmedabad, spanning distribution, engineering & design, manufacturing and sales & marketing. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and Procurement for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Ball Bearings and Roller Bearing, Industrial Manufacturing

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 31 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does SKF operate in India?
faq.a: SKF operates 9 active Global Capability Center sites in India. Ten are on record in total, including non-operational sites.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does SKF have GCC centers in?
faq.a: SKF's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru, Pune, Haridwar, Mumbai, Mysuru and Ahmedabad.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does SKF run in India?
faq.a: SKF runs distribution, engineering & design, manufacturing and sales & marketing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at SKF's India GCCs?
faq.a: SKF's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads SKF's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 31 leaders at SKF's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
